task.title: Probe and provision 5-agent topology from openclaw-33 family
task.goal: Determine whether one manager openclaw-33 base instance plus four derived subagents (editor, worker-33, worker-xhs, tester) can be provisioned for the new news test workflow, and create them if the live environment supports it.
must_do: Use openclaw-33 as manager source instance.
Attempt to provision four derived agents for roles editor, worker-33, worker-xhs, tester from the openclaw-33 instance family.
Do not substitute unrelated existing agents.
If topology can be created, return actual agent identities and readiness evidence.
If topology cannot be created, stop at the first real blocker and classify it precisely.
must_not_do: Do not run the workflow yet.
Do not create fake cycle logs or fake agent identities.
Do not print secret tokens in output.
acceptance: Either 5-agent topology is ready with manager + four derived subagents, or the first blocker is reported with evidence.
Any created agents are explicitly tied to the openclaw-33 family.
task.notes: This is a narrowed repair step for branch A. Work only on topology readiness. You may use community API and onboarding scripts, but keep output strict JSON and do not expose tokens.
